responseText:
Perfect! I have all the data for your Rivian R1S (ToughNut). Here's the summary and narrative for February 27 - March 8, 2026:

## **10-Day Activity Summary (Feb 27 - Mar 8, 2026)**

**Overall Stats:**
- **Total Distance:** 1,077.9 miles
- **Total Drives:** 74 trips
- **Average Efficiency:** 64%
- **Total Charging:** 17 sessions, 669.7 kWh added
- **Total Charging Cost:** ~$51.47 USD

---

## **Daily Breakdown**

| Date | Distance | Drives | Charges | Efficiency | Notes |
|------|----------|--------|---------|------------|-------|
| **Feb 27** | 118.4 mi | 10 | 2 | 62% | Road trip start |
| **Feb 28** | 70.8 mi | 4 | 3 | 71% | Heavy charging day |
| **Mar 1** | 131.1 mi | 5 | 2 | 62% | Cross-country driving |
| **Mar 2** | 160.7 mi | 8 | 3 | 65% | Major travel day |
| **Mar 3** | 158.9 mi | 9 | 2 | 61% | Extended driving |
| **Mar 4** | 206.0 mi | 5 | 2 | 68% | **Longest driving day** |
| **Mar 5** | 96.2 mi | 10 | 2 | 72% | **Best efficiency** |
| **Mar 6** | 65.7 mi | 13 | 2 | 54% | Many short trips |
| **Mar 7** | 10.0 mi | 4 | 1 | 44% | Minimal activity |
| **Mar 8** | 60.2 mi | 6 | 0 | 61% | Day wrapping up |

---

## **Notable Narrative: A Multi-Day Road Trip Adventure**

Your Rivian embarked on an **epic 10-day road trip** spanning from Connecticut to Vermont and back. Here's the story:

**Phase 1: Breaking Free (Feb 27-28)**
The journey kicked off on February 27 with short-haul driving around Connecticut before hitting two fast-charging sessions. You were prepping for something big. On Feb 28, with 122.7 kWh added across 3 charging sessions, ToughNut was fully loaded and ready to roll.

**Phase 2: Cross-Country Push (Mar 1-4)**
Days 1-4 of driving represented the heavy-lifting portion of the trip. With 656.7 miles covered across 27 drives, you made a northward push from Connecticut:
- **Mar 1:** Started moving north (131 mi) with charges in Bennington, VT area
- **Mar 2:** **Major day** (160.7 mi) - Multiple DC fast-charging stops including Ludlow, VT and North Canaan, CT
- **Mar 3:** Continued momentum (158.9 mi) - Charged in West Lebanon, NH area
- **Mar 4:** **Peak driving day** (206 mi) - The furthest day of the entire trip with strategic DC fast charges in Montpelier, Lebanon, NH, and Holyoke, MA

**Phase 3: Local Exploration (Mar 5-6)**
Days 5-6 showed a shift in pattern. After reaching your destination, activity became localized:
- **Mar 5:** Lighter day (96.2 mi) with best efficiency (72%) - likely settling into the area around Dover, VT
- **Mar 6:** Short hops (65.7 mi across 13 separate trips) - exploring or running errands in the Torrington/Cornwall, CT region

**Phase 4: Winding Down (Mar 7-8)**
The trip's final days showed minimal movement:
- **Mar 7:** Only 10 miles of driving - clearly parked somewhere, possibly a charging/rest day
- **Mar 8:** Light day wrapping up (60 mi) with multiple short trips back around the Sharon/Litchfield, CT area

**Key Insights:**
- You took a **round-trip route** up to the Vermont/NH border and back to Connecticut
- **11 DC fast-charging stops** (215-218 kW each) and 6 home/L2 charging sessions fueled the journey
- Most efficient drive: **96% efficiency** on Mar 8 from Sharon to Litchfield (20.3 mi)
- Least efficient: **23% efficiency** on Mar 7 (very short hop, likely in snow/cold conditions)
- The trip was **well-managed**: You never ran critically low on battery before charging
- Cost-effective use of DC fast charging where available (several sessions at $0) and home charging for overnight refueling

This was a purposeful, well-executed road trip with smart charging strategy and a return to home base by week's end.
